# react-native-skia-android

Skia prebuilt binaries for Android (all architectures)

## About

This package contains prebuilt Skia libraries from [Shopify/react-native-skia](https://github.com/Shopify/react-native-skia).

- **Skia Version**: m144c
- **Package Version**: 144.3.0
- **Platform**: android


## Included Architectures

| Architecture | Description |
|--------------|-------------|
| `armeabi-v7a` | armeabi-v7a |
| `arm64-v8a` | arm64-v8a |
| `x86` | x86 |
| `x86_64` | x86_64 |

## Installation

```bash
npm install react-native-skia-android
```

The binaries are included directly in this package - no postinstall download required.
